title: The Straw Hats Struggle to Adapt
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Punk Hazard Guards. The central beat is the straw hats struggle to adapt.
scene: The scene focuses on the straw hats struggle to adapt, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Punk Hazard Guards shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Punk Hazard, Ice Side - Luffy's Team

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That was a crazy loud noise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Maybe it was Sanji and the others...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All right, then... just run faster!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Such humiliation ... I can't believe this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This Croco- Guy doesn't seem very sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I do have feelings, you know !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UFU FUFFU FU FU FU FUFFU...

summary: The Straw Hats Struggle to Adapt. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
